state.title: ticket-reducer.py KeyError on LINK events using 'target' instead of 'target_id'
state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: mechanical. All 112 LINK events on disk use 'target' key but the reducer at line 364 expects 'target_id'. Fix: use data.get('target_id', data.get('target', '')) pattern already used in cutover-tickets-migration.sh line 897. Also fix ticket-link.sh (lines 110, 250) and ticket-graph.py (line 464) which read 'target_id' only.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
